findings.title: Stack buffer overflow in set_label via strcpy
findings.description: strcpy copies user-supplied label into fixed-size label[48] without bounds checking

findings.title: Heap buffer overflow in DataPipeline ingest without capacity check
findings.description: Ingest writes past heap-allocated buffer when ingested count exceeds pipeline capacity

findings.title: Stack buffer overflow in tagged input tag extraction
findings.description: memcpy copies unbounded tag_len bytes into fixed-size tag[16] based on user-controlled separator position

findings.title: Stack buffer overflow in tagged input payload via strcpy
findings.description: strcpy copies user-controlled payload into fixed-size payload[256] without bounds checking

findings.title: Stack buffer overflow in aggregate_readings without bounds check
findings.description: Unbounded parsing loop writes past fixed-size readings[32] array

findings.title: Stack buffer overflow in copy_with_prefix ignoring destination size
findings.description: dest_size parameter accepted but unused; memcpy writes input-derived length to caller's fixed-size buffer
